name: ReleaseNotes.io
description: ReleaseNotes.io — dedicated release notes publishing platform for software teams, with public changelog pages and subscriber notifications.

seo.title: ReleaseNotes.io — Developer Documentation / DevRel
seo.meta_description: ReleaseNotes.io: ReleaseNotes.io — dedicated release notes publishing platform for software teams, with public changelog pages and subscriber notifications.

when_to_use: Public changelog page linked from developer portal footer
Email digest sent to API subscribers on every release
Structured release notes separating features, fixes, and breaking changes
Changelog embedded as iframe in in-app what's-new panel
RSS feed published for changelog consumed by developer blogs

pros: Purpose-built for release notes, unlike general tools
Public changelog pages with subscription notifications
Simple editor reduces time to publish each release
Custom domain support for branded changelogs
cons: Single-purpose tool duplicates Canny or Headway features
Limited integration depth with dev tools
Small team means uncertain long-term roadmap
Pricing feels steep for a narrow use case
review.verdict: Dedicated tool does one thing well; hard to justify if you already have Canny, Headway, or a blog.
review.best_for: Small SaaS teams wanting branded, standalone release-note pages without building their own.
review.not_for: Teams with an existing changelog tool or marketing site that could host release notes.
